title: recursive-ADT rich-gate
manager: Recursive ADTs — a tree, a linked list, a JSON value defined in terms of itself — admitted through a "rich gate" that allows them only where the machinery (equality, serialization, finiteness) can still cope. Recursion is what lets you model genuinely nested data; the gate is what keeps that power from silently breaking replay or blowing past the finite band without anyone noticing until a proof won't terminate.
cs: self-referential ADT definitions behind a capability gate; interacts with acyclic-data (W6.44), serialization, and the finite band.
